title: HoverWorth
description: Ever wanted to add item worth to lore just like DonutSMP does? HoverWorth is here to do that!
body:
# 💰 HoverWorth / LoreWorth

> ✨ Instantly see how much your items are worth just by hovering over them in your inventory!

---
## ✨ Showcase
![HoverWorth GIF Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/wS4krD3.gif)
---

## 🚀 Features
- Hover over items to see their value per piece 🪙
- Hover over items to see their description (optional)
- Fully customizable lore messages via `config.yml` ✏️
- Configure your `worth.yml` for any item's worth and description (optional) 📄
- Automatically updates when items are moved or picked up 🔄
- Lightweight and efficient — minimal server impact ⚡
- Compatible with Paper, Spigot, and PacketEvents
- EconomyShopsGUI integration for prices! _(Feel free to suggest more integrations on my discord)_
---

## ⚙️ Setup
1. Install [PacketEvents](https://modrinth.com/plugin/packetevents) first.
2. Place `HoverWorth.jar` and `PacketEvents` in your `plugins` folder.
3. Configure item values and description in `worth.yml`.
4. Customize your currency symbol and lore messages in `config.yml`.
5. Restart your server. Players can now hover to see item worth! ✅
---

## Commands
**/hwreload** - Reload config.yml and worth (hoverworth.reload)

---

## 💡 Why HoverWorth?
Make your economy transparent and fun!  
Players can instantly see item values without opening GUIs or typing commands. Perfect for shops, trading, and custom economies.
